name: BOX INC
summary: Overview Box is the leading Intelligent Content Management (ICM) provider. Box gives organizations a single platform for their unstructured data which typically represents about 90% of all data within an organization. This data is content from blueprints to wireframes, videos to documents, proprietary formats to PDFs and it is the source of an organizations unique value. The Box ICM platform enables our customers to securely manage the entire content lifecycle, from the moment a file is created ...
